layoutRegions.name: hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize owner receipt readiness and expose audit packet sealing.

layoutRegions.name: receipt-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare owner receipts by cleanup evidence, delegated signoff, acknowledgement state, and progress.

layoutRegions.name: ledger-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect missing acknowledgements, delegated signoffs, retry queues, stale credential evidence, audit packet fields, and rollback accountability.

components.name: MetricCard
components.purpose: Show owner receipt totals and risk tone with stable dimensions.

components.name: ReceiptCard
components.purpose: Show a cleanup owner receipt with owner, evidence, signoff, status, and progress.
interactions: status chip stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: LedgerRow
components.purpose: Dense rows for acknowledgements, delegated signoffs, stale evidence, and audit packet fields.
interactions: row layout stacks at mobile widths
status labels remain visible without layout shift

components.name: SealAuditPacketButton
components.purpose: Primary action for sealing rollback-safe owner accountability evidence.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states use accent tokens

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
